name: TableColumn
summary: A TableColumn is a single column from a table.

properties.name: left_edge_style
properties.summary: The #left_edge_style method returns the Style of a Layout::TableColumn's left edge.
properties.remarks: The #left_edge_style method returns the Style of a Layout::TableColumn's left edge. If this is the first column of the table, this method will return the style of the table border.

properties.name: right_edge_style
properties.summary: The #right_edge_style method returns the Style of a Layout::TableColumn's right edge.
properties.remarks: The #right_edge_style method returns the Style of a Layout::TableColumn's right edge. If this is the last column of the table, this method will return the style of the table border.

properties.name: width
properties.summary: The #width method returns the width of the Layout::TableColumn.
properties.remarks: The #width method returns the width of the Layout::TableColumn.
